hero.title: Find your fit in 3 quick taps.
hero.subtitle: No menus. No filters to fiddle with. Tell us who, what, and which size — we'll show only items that match.

footer.tagline: Pre-loved branded thrift · Free message-to-buy on WhatsApp

step1.title: Who are you shopping for?
step1.subtitle: Pick one. We'll only show items that fit.

step2.title: What type of item?
step2.subtitle: Tap the kind of thing you're looking for.

step3.title: Select your preferred size(s)
step3.subtitle: You can pick more than one. Skip if you're not sure.
step3.subtitleAccessories: Most accessories are one size — just tap continue.
step3.skipHint: Not sure? Tap {cta} — we'll show every size.

shop.itemCount: {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}} in stock

empty.title: Nothing matches yet
empty.body: New arrivals drop every week. Try fewer sizes, or message us on WhatsApp and we'll keep an eye out for you.

whatsapp.intro: Hi Balna! I'd like to buy:
